with:
  # Build a quick lookup for locations of entities (used for record labels)
      location_map = {t.subject: t.object for t in triples if t.predicate == "location"}
  
      for subj in order:
          parts: list[str] = []
          triples_here = subj_map[subj]
  
          # ----- genre -----
          genre_objs = [t.object for t in triples_here if t.predicate == "genre"]
          if genre_objs:
              genre_phrase = f"{subj} is a {genre_objs[0].lower()} artist"
              # stylistic origin of the genre (genre as subject)
              origins = [t.object for t in triples if t.subject == genre_objs[0] and t.predicate ==...
              if origins:
                  genre_phrase += f", originating from {origins[0].lower()}"
              parts.append(genre_phrase)
  
          # ----- associated band / musical artist (multiple) -----
          assoc_objs = [t.object for t in triples_here if t.predicate == "associatedBand/associated...
          if assoc_objs:
              parts.append(f"{subj} is associated with {fmt_list(assoc_objs)}")
  
          # ----- instrument (multiple) -----
          instr_objs = [t.object for t in triples_here if t.predicate == "instrument"]
          if instr_objs:
              # If the subject looks like a genre (contains space or is capitalised) treat instrume...

                  parts.append(f"The {fmt_list(instr_objs).lower()} is an instrument used in {subj}")
